title: erigeron basilobatus
intro: Erigeron basilobatus, also known as Erigeron karvinskianus, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb native to Mexico, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and flowers. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and skin conditions, due to their astringent and antiseptic properties. Erigeron basilobatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, promoting overall health and well-being.
